Resources

Whitepapers & Guides

Technical deep-dives, business case frameworks, and practical guides for industrial asset monitoring.

Guide

The 5 Major Condition Monitoring Technologies Compared

A practical guide comparing vibration analysis, oil analysis, thermography, acoustic emission, and electrical signature analysis — with pros, cons, and use cases for each.

18 pages · PDF
Whitepaper

ESA vs Vibration Analysis: A Technical Comparison

When to use electrical signature analysis, when to use vibration, and how they complement each other for complete rotating equipment coverage.

14 pages · PDF
Framework

Building the Business Case for Predictive Maintenance

A step-by-step ROI framework for justifying condition monitoring investment — with calculation templates, benchmark data, and board-ready presentation structure.

12 pages · PDF
